explanations.1: This checks if Apache has the mod_rewrite module available before trying to use rewriting rules.
explanations.3: The exclamation mark means NOT, so this line says 'if the visitor's IP address is NOT 127.0.0.1 (localhost), then continue'.
explanations.5: This is a placeholder where you'd add your own IP address so that you can see the real site while others see the maintenance page.
explanations.6: This exempts the maintenance.php file itself from being redirected, otherwise visitors would get stuck in a loop.
explanations.7: If all the conditions above are true, send any request to the maintenance.php file instead; [L] stops processing further rules, [QSA] preserves any query parameters.
